name: MOM(20)>0 TQQQ
overfit_notes: Single built-in MOM(20) indicator with threshold at zero — minimal tuning, textbook momentum signal
description: Uses QQQ's 20-day built-in momentum indicator as a pure trend gate. Holds TQQQ whenever Nasdaq momentum is positive and T-bills when it turns negative, with no additional filters.

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open (only on regime change)

name: ATR(14)<ATR(60) Long Calm TQQQ
overfit_notes: Two ATR periods (14 and 60) with a canonical short-vs-long comparison — standard volatility regime pattern, no exotic thresholds
description: Identifies calm vs. volatile market regimes by comparing short-term and long-term Average True Range on QQQ. Holds TQQQ when current volatility (ATR-14) is below its long-run baseline (ATR-60), and T-bills when volatility is elevated.

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open (only on regime change)

name: AvgReturn(20)>0 TQQQ
overfit_notes: Single 20-day lookback with threshold at zero — no tuned parameters beyond window size, functionally equivalent to MOM
description: Computes the average of QQQ's 20 most recent daily returns as a simple momentum proxy. Holds TQQQ when the mean daily return over the window is positive and T-bills when it turns negative.

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open (only on regime change)
